errors.invalid_governance: The requested governance is not supported for the selected mode.
errors.quick_requires_two_models: Quick requires exactly two distinct models.
errors.coordinator_not_in_panel: The coordinator must be one of the explicitly selected models.
errors.distributed_requires_manifest: Distributed Standard requires a versioned experiment manifest and alignment policy.
errors.phase_quorum_not_met: A panel phase did not meet quorum.
errors.coordinator_failed: A coordinator phase failed after one retry.
errors.global_compose_failed: GlobalCompose failed; topic ledgers are returned as the canonical fallback.
errors.context_budget_exceeded: GlobalCompose input remains over budget after one traceable topic-brief pass.
